# opnsense_quagga_bgp_redistribution (Resource)

Configure redistribution rules for BGP.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "opnsense_quagga_bgp_redistribution" "example" {
  redistribute = "connected"
  description  = "Redistribute connected routes into BGP"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `redistribute` (String) The protocol to redistribute into BGP.

### Optional

- `description` (String) An optional description for this redistribution rule. Defaults to `""`.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this redistribution rule. Defaults to `true`.
- `linked_route_map` (String) The route map UUID to apply to redistributed routes. Defaults to `""`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the redistribution rule.

## Import

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, use an [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) to import opnsense_quagga_bgp_redistribution using the `id`. For example:

```terraform
import {
  to = opnsense_quagga_bgp_redistribution.example
  id = "<opnsense-resource-id>"
}
```

Using `terraform import`, import opnsense_quagga_bgp_redistribution using the `id`. For example:

```console
% terraform import opnsense_quagga_bgp_redistribution.example <opnsense-resource-id>
```
